mapper.select: SELECT ISNULL(W.ORDQTY, 0) AS ORD_QTY, ISNULL(P.TOT_PRODQTY, 0) AS TOT_PROD_QTY, ISNULL(P.TOT_PRODQTY, 0) - ISNULL(F.TOT_FAILQTY, 0) AS TOT_GOOD_QTY, ISNULL(F.TOT_FAILQTY, 0) AS TOT_FAIL_QTY, ISNULL(P.TOT_PRODQTY, 0) AS PROD_QTY, ISNULL(P.TOT_PRODQTY, 0) - ISNULL(F.TOT_FAILQTY, 0) AS GOOD_QTY, ISNULL(F.TOT_FAILQTY, 0) AS FAIL_QTY FROM TBL_PROD_WORKORDER W LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WORKORDNO, SUM(LOTQTY) AS TOT_PRODQTY FROM TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE WHERE LOTSTATE != 'CANCELED' GROUP BY WORKORDNO ) P ON W.WORKORDNO = P.WORKORDNO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT P2.WORKORDNO, SUM(FQ.FAILQTY) AS TOT_FAILQTY FROM TBL_PROD_FAILQTY FQ JOIN TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE P2 ON FQ.LOTNO = P2.LOTNO GROUP BY P2.WORKORDNO ) F ON W.WORKORDNO = F.WORKORDNO WHERE W.WORKORDNO = #{WORKORDNO}

SELECT S.LOTNO, S.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, S.LOTQTY AS INPUT_QTY, G.UNIT, ISNULL(W.ORDQTY, 0) AS NEED_QTY, 0 AS STOCK_QTY FROM TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE S LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON S.PARTNO = G.PARTNO LEFT JOIN TBL_PROD_WORKORDER W ON S.WORKORDNO = W.WORKORDNO WHERE S.WORKORDNO = #{WORKORDNO} AND S.LOTSTATE != 'CANCELED' ORDER BY S.LOTNO DESC

SELECT S.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, S.LINECD, S.PROCESSCD, S.SHIFT, S.LOTNO, S.LOTQTY AS GOOD_QTY, ISNULL(F.TOT_FAILQTY, 0) AS FAIL_QTY, G.UNIT, ISNULL(S.LOTCREATIONDAY, '') AS START_DATE, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), S.WORKDAY, 23) AS END_DATE, S.LOTSTATE FROM TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE S LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON S.PARTNO = G.PARTNO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT LOTNO, SUM(FAILQTY) AS TOT_FAILQTY FROM TBL_PROD_FAILQTY GROUP BY LOTNO ) F ON S.LOTNO = F.LOTNO WHERE S.WORKORDNO = #{WORKORDNO} AND S.LOTSTATE != 'CANCELED' ORDER BY S.REGDTM DESC, S.LOTNO DESC

SELECT S.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, W.LINECD, W.PROCESSCD, W.SHIFT, FQ.LOTNO, FQ.FAILQTY AS FAIL_LOT_QTY, G.UNIT, FQ.FAILTYPE AS FAIL_REASON, FQ.FAILBREAKDOWN AS FAIL_CAUSE FROM TBL_PROD_FAILQTY FQ JOIN TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE S ON FQ.LOTNO = S.LOTNO LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON S.PARTNO = G.PARTNO LEFT JOIN TBL_PROD_WORKORDER W ON S.WORKORDNO = W.WORKORDNO WHERE S.WORKORDNO = #{WORKORDNO} ORDER BY FQ.LOTNO DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_PROD_WORKORDER SET ORDSTATE = #{ORDSTATE}, STDATE = CASE WHEN #{ORDSTATE} = 'STARTED' THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 23) WHEN #{ORDSTATE} = 'NEW' THEN NULL ELSE STDATE END, STTIME = CASE WHEN #{ORDSTATE} = 'STARTED' THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), GETDATE(), 108) WHEN #{ORDSTATE} = 'NEW' THEN NULL ELSE STTIME END, ENDDATE = CASE WHEN #{ORDSTATE} = 'DONE' THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 23) WHEN #{ORDSTATE} = 'NEW' THEN NULL ELSE ENDDATE END, ENDTIME = CASE WHEN #{ORDSTATE} = 'DONE' THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), GETDATE(), 108) WHEN #{ORDSTATE} = 'NEW' THEN NULL ELSE ENDTIME END, CLOSEYN = CASE WHEN #{ORDSTATE} = 'DONE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, EDITDTM = GETDATE(), EDITUSERID = 1 WHERE WORKORDNO = #{WORKORDNO}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE ( LOTNO, WORKORDNO, PARTNO, LOTQTY, UNIT, LOTSTATE, LOTTYPE, LOTCREATIONDAY, WORKDAY, LINECD, PROCESSCD, SHIFT, REGDTM, REGUSERID ) VALUES ( #{LOTNO}, #{WORKORDNO}, #{PARTNO}, #{LOTQTY}, #{UNIT}, 'CREATED', '정상', CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 23), CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 23), #{LINECD}, #{PROCESSCD}, #{SHIFT}, GETDATE(), 1 )
